seoTitle: Greenough vs Greenwoods Valley — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Greenough and Greenwoods Valley. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Greenough vs Greenwoods Valley: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Greenough and Greenwoods Valley.
heading: Greenough vs Greenwoods Valley — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Greenough, Western Australia and Greenwoods Valley, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Greenwoods Valley has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Greenough (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Greenough or Greenwoods Valley safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Greenough has a flood risk score of 37/100, while Greenwoods Valley scores 31/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Greenough scores 49/100 for bushfire risk. Greenwoods Valley scores 55/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Greenough or Greenwoods Valley?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Greenwoods Valley has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.85% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
